name: Tessera Technologies, Inc.
description: Tessera Technologies, Inc., which rebranded and evolved into Xperi Inc., is an American multinational technology company headquartered in San Jose, California. The company specializes in developing and licensing innovative software and intellectual property for consumer electronics, connected cars, and media platforms. By focusing on advanced imaging, audio, and connectivity technologies, the firm creates solutions that enhance digital experiences across various devices and services. Following various corporate restructurings and acquisitions, the entity continues to be a significant player in the global technology sector, providing essential innovations that power modern entertainment and communication systems.
